TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Aron_Baynes, title = Aron_Baynes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aron_Baynes} }

S.FORM: Aron Baynes hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Aron Baynes, biru na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya Aron Baynes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. t'aring sa kawas 2013, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. qyanux na sraral Baynes htgan na ryax maki Gisborne, New Zealand. aring cyugal kawas Baynes ga,hiya qutux cinngasal musa beh Mareeba, Queensland. pinqbaqan nya Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Mareeba State pqwsan biru seneng sa Mareeba, Queensland. Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Cairns State pqwsan biru seneng sa Cairns, Queensland. Aron Baynes, t'aring kawas tay 2005 tehuk kawas tay 2009, mqwas biru sa Washington State pqwsan biru krahu. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Aron Baynes hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska' / pkaki' kkska'. kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 12, Aron Baynes, biru na p'unro. mintzyuwaw nya Aron Baynes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. t'aring sa kawas 2013, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. qyanux na sraral Baynes htgan na ryax maki Gisborne, New Zealand. aring cyugal kawas Baynes ga,hiya qutux cinngasal musa beh Mareeba, Queensland. pinqbaqan nya Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Mareeba State pqwsan biru seneng sa Mareeba, Queensland. Aron Baynes mqwas biru sa Cairns State pqwsan biru seneng sa Cairns, Queensland. Aron Baynes, t'aring kawas tay 2005 tehuk kawas tay 2009, mqwas biru sa Washington State pqwsan biru krahu. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: aron Œ≤ajnes~…ï ƒßja î…£a nŒ≤a p…£naw î mari î mis~…ïuw qanij, qutux s~…ïa pzja≈ã pkaki î taj ks~…ïka î / pkaki î kks~…ïka î. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj * nqu taj **, aron Œ≤ajnes~…ï, Œ≤iru na p îunro. mintzjuwaw nja aron Œ≤ajnes~…ï s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a. t îari≈ã s~…ïa kawas~…ï ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nŒ≤a. qjanux na s~…ïraral Œ≤ajnes~…ï ƒßt…£an na rjax maki …£is~…ïŒ≤orne, new zealan*. ari≈ã ¶~ ®ju…£al kawas~…ï Œ≤ajnes~…ï …£a,ƒßija qutux ¶~ ®in≈ãas~…ïal mus~…ïa Œ≤eƒß mareeŒ≤a, queens~…ïlan*. pinqŒ≤aqan nja aron Œ≤ajnes~…ï mqwas~…ï Œ≤iru s~…ïa mareeŒ≤a s~…ïtate pqws~…ïan Œ≤iru s~…ïene≈ã s~…ïa mareeŒ≤a, queens~…ïlan*. aron Œ≤ajnes~…ï mqwas~…ï Œ≤iru s~…ïa ¶~ ®airns~…ï s~…ïtate pqws~…ïan Œ≤iru s~…ïene≈ã s~…ïa ¶~ ®airns~…ï, queens~…ïlan*. aron Œ≤ajnes~…ï, t îari≈ã kawas~…ï taj **** teƒßuk kawas~…ï taj ****, mqwas~…ï Œ≤iru s~…ïa was~…ïƒßi≈ãton s~…ïtate pqws~…ïan Œ≤iru kraƒßu. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja î ps~…ïp≈ãan mari s~…ïa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®i≈ã mas~…ïuq ms~…ïpu≈ã mari s~…ïa ps~…ïp≈ãan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al Œ≤ja ¶~ ®i≈ã l…£a ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
